subject: Urgent: Your account will be suspended
body: Dear user, unusual activity detected. Verify immediately at http://bit.ly/secure-login-verify to avoid suspension.

subject: Interview confirmation
body: Hi Muhammad, your interview is scheduled for Monday at 11:00 AM. Please bring your student ID.

subject: Password reset required
body: Your mailbox password expires today. Reset now at https://mail-security-check.com/login/update.
